availability_profiles_snooze_shape.name: availability_profiles_snooze_shape
availability_profiles_snooze_shape.value: "availability_profiles"."manual_snooze_until" is null or "availability_profiles"."manual_snooze_started_at" is not null

attachment_upload_stages_size_valid.name: attachment_upload_stages_size_valid
attachment_upload_stages_size_valid.value:
"attachment_upload_stages"."size_bytes" > 0 and "attachment_upload_stages"."size_bytes" <= 20971520 and (
				("attachment_upload_stages"."finalized_attachment_id" is null and "attachment_upload_stages"."data" is not null and octet_length("attachment_upload_stages"."data") = "attachment_upload_stages"."size_bytes")
				or ("attachment_upload_stages"."finalized_attachment_id" is not null and "attachment_upload_stages"."data" is null)
			)

reminders_held_shape.name: reminders_held_shape
reminders_held_shape.value: ("reminders"."delivery_state" = 'held') = ("reminders"."held_at" is not null and "reminders"."held_reason" is not null)

import_batches_status_shape.name: import_batches_status_shape
import_batches_status_shape.value: ("import_batches"."status" = 'imported' and "import_batches"."rolled_back_at" is null) or ("import_batches"."status" = 'rolled_back' and "import_batches"."rolled_back_at" is not null)

intake_form_fields_options_valid.name: intake_form_fields_options_valid
intake_form_fields_options_valid.value:
jsonb_typeof("intake_form_fields"."options") = 'array' and (
				("intake_form_fields"."field_type" = 'select' and jsonb_array_length("intake_form_fields"."options") between 2 and 20)
				or ("intake_form_fields"."field_type" <> 'select' and "intake_form_fields"."options" = '[]'::jsonb)
			)

mail_outbound_lease_consistent.name: mail_outbound_lease_consistent
mail_outbound_lease_consistent.value: ("mail_outbound_messages"."status" = 'sending') = ("mail_outbound_messages"."lease_token" IS NOT NULL AND "mail_outbound_messages"."lease_until" IS NOT NULL)

mail_outbound_accepted_consistent.name: mail_outbound_accepted_consistent
mail_outbound_accepted_consistent.value: ("mail_outbound_messages"."status" = 'accepted') = ("mail_outbound_messages"."accepted_at" IS NOT NULL AND "mail_outbound_messages"."provider_message_id" IS NOT NULL)

mail_sync_states_lease_consistent.name: mail_sync_states_lease_consistent
mail_sync_states_lease_consistent.value: ("mail_sync_states"."status" = 'running') = ("mail_sync_states"."lease_token" IS NOT NULL AND "mail_sync_states"."lease_until" IS NOT NULL)

task_polls_options_valid.name: task_polls_options_valid
task_polls_options_valid.value:
jsonb_typeof("task_polls"."options") = 'array' and (
				("task_polls"."response_type" in ('single_choice', 'multiple_choice') and jsonb_array_length("task_polls"."options") between 2 and 20)
				or ("task_polls"."response_type" not in ('single_choice', 'multiple_choice') and "task_polls"."options" = '[]'::jsonb)
			)

project_milestones_condition_shape.name: project_milestones_condition_shape

project_custom_fields_options_valid.name: project_custom_fields_options_valid
project_custom_fields_options_valid.value:
jsonb_typeof("project_custom_fields"."options") = 'array' and (
				("project_custom_fields"."field_type" = 'select' and jsonb_array_length("project_custom_fields"."options") between 2 and 50)
				or ("project_custom_fields"."field_type" <> 'select' and "project_custom_fields"."options" = '[]'::jsonb)
			)

filters_tasks_v1_owner.name: filters_tasks_v1_owner
filters_tasks_v1_owner.value: "filters"."query" <> 'tasks:v1' OR ("filters"."workspace_id" IS NOT NULL AND "filters"."user_id" IS NOT NULL)

task_occ_overrides_start_requires_due_da.name: task_occ_overrides_start_requires_due_date
task_occ_overrides_start_requires_due_da.value: "task_occurrence_overrides"."override_start_date" is null or "task_occurrence_overrides"."override_due_date" is not null

tasks_deadline_not_before_due.name: tasks_deadline_not_before_due
tasks_deadline_not_before_due.value: "tasks"."deadline" is null or "tasks"."due_date" is null or "tasks"."deadline" >= "tasks"."due_date"

task_acceptances_response_shape.name: task_acceptances_response_shape
task_acceptances_response_shape.value: ("task_acceptances"."status" = 'pending' and "task_acceptances"."responded_at" is null) or ("task_acceptances"."status" <> 'pending' and "task_acceptances"."responded_at" is not null)

statuses_scope_owner_valid.name: statuses_scope_owner_valid
statuses_scope_owner_valid.value:
("statuses"."scope" = 'project' and "statuses"."project_id" is not null and "statuses"."workspace_id" is null)
				or ("statuses"."scope" = 'workspace' and "statuses"."workspace_id" is not null and "statuses"."project_id" is null)
